description: This pipeline applies a series of image processing operations to subtract background, smooth, and apply thresholding and morphological transformations to input data, allowing for automated analysis and enhancement of biomedical images in a multi-step process.

16856f19-8ea7-4dd7-9f55-0ab1c14a6509.name: ij1-background-rollingball2d
16856f19-8ea7-4dd7-9f55-0ab1c14a6509.description: Finds or subtracts the background of a 2D slice via a rolling-ball or paraboloid algorithm. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

fe98ec61-b3a6-43c3-92ea-fa7014754934.name: ij1-threshold-auto2d
fe98ec61-b3a6-43c3-92ea-fa7014754934.description:
Applies an auto-thresholding algorithm. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

2a245bc3-ddc7-475b-bc62-788d88a95afd.name: ij1-blur-gaussian2d
2a245bc3-ddc7-475b-bc62-788d88a95afd.description: Applies convolution with a Gaussian function for smoothing. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

776ad311-a90b-4e4f-af81-31fb6d4317e4.name: ij1-morph-binary-fillholes2d
776ad311-a90b-4e4f-af81-31fb6d4317e4.description: Applies a morphological hole filling operation to binary images.If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

b1e3d371-8071-4dfa-845a-c44696562d0e.name: ij1-threshold-auto2d
b1e3d371-8071-4dfa-845a-c44696562d0e.description:
Applies an auto-thresholding algorithm. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.
